fields.label: Collection ID
fields.description: Open your Adalo application and click on the three buttons beside the collection name, then select API Documentation

fields.label: Data to Send
fields.description: Whether to insert the input data this node receives in the new row

fields.label: Inputs to Ignore
fields.description: List of input properties to avoid sending, separated by commas. Leave empty to send all properties.

fields.label: Fields to Send
fields.description: Field must be defined in the collection, otherwise it will be ignored. If field defined in the collection is not set here, it will be set to null. (JSON object; supported keys: fieldValues, fieldValues.fieldId, fieldValues.fieldValue)
